common.siteDescription: Premium digital marketplace with fast delivery and trusted support.

home.heroSubtitle: Get your digital products instantly and securely.
home.heroSlide1Subtitle: Get your digital products instantly and securely.
home.heroSlide2Subtitle: Trusted marketplace for premium gaming products.
home.heroSlide3Subtitle: Secure delivery with unbeatable support and pricing.
home.heroFeatures: Verified payment · Fast delivery · Real support
home.promoBannerPlaceholder: Limited offers — premium digital deals updated weekly
home.whyInstantDesc: Automatic products are delivered right after payment is confirmed.
home.whySecureDesc: Every order is reviewed and payment is confirmed before fulfillment.
home.whySupportDesc: Open a support ticket anytime if you need help with an order.
home.whyTrackingDesc: Follow your order status from submission through delivery in your account.
home.pickYourPathSubtitle: Choose how you want to shop.
home.riyontPicksSubtitle: Three hand-picked products — not another Most Requested row.
home.supportCueText: Support is available for questions about products, delivery, and orders.
home.noProductsInCategory: No products in this category yet.
home.footerTagline: Premium digital marketplace — instant delivery, trusted support.
home.footerAbout: Your trusted destination for premium digital products — fast delivery, secure checkout, and reliable support.
home.footerNewsletterDesc: Get drops, deals, and new releases — no spam.
home.trustSectionSubtitle: Real service promises — no inflated numbers or placeholder reviews.
home.reviewsShopCta: Shop products to leave a review
home.storeReviewHint: Share your experience with Riyont — we publish reviews after moderation.
home.storeReviewBodyPlaceholder: Tell others about delivery speed, support, and overall experience…
home.storeReviewSuccess: Thank you! Your store review was submitted and is pending approval.

home.review1Quote: Fast delivery and smooth checkout — exactly what I needed.
home.review2Quote: Premium quality products and responsive support team.

home.heroPromo1Subtitle: Steam, subscriptions & gift cards — instant delivery.
home.heroPromo3Subtitle: Software keys, VPN & tools delivered to your inbox.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to manage orders and digital deliveries
auth.metaDescription: Sign in or create an account to manage orders and deliveries.
auth.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.VALIDATION: Please check your email and password.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_CONFIRMED: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.USER_ALREADY_REGISTERED: An account with this email already exists.
errors.WEAK_PASSWORD: Password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.
errors.RATE_LIMIT: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.OAUTH_FAILED: Could not start social sign-in. Please try again.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toast.registered: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is required.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.metaDescription: Review items in your cart before checkout.
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Browse products to get started.
cart.checkoutNote: Checkout submits an order request. You pay externally after we send payment instructions—no card payment on this site.
cart.checkoutSubtitle: Review your items and complete your order in one step.

categories.title: Categories
categories.browseSubtitle: Explore collections of digital products — gaming, software, subscriptions, and more.
categories.emptyDescription: Categories will appear here once they are published.
categories.emptySearchDescription: Try a different search term or browse all products.

catalog.emptyDescription: Check back soon — new products are added regularly.
catalog.loadErrorDescription: We could not reach the catalog. Please try again.

support.title: Support
support.description: Open a ticket to get help with orders, delivery, or general questions.
support.contactHint: Signed-in customers can message our team directly.
support.signInRequired: Sign in to open and manage support tickets.
support.subject: Subject
support.attachmentHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF — max 5MB

errors.VALIDATION: Please check the form and try again.
errors.CREATE_FAILED: Could not create ticket. Please try again.
errors.SEND_FAILED: Could not send message. Please try again.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.secureSubtitle: Submit your order request. Payment is completed outside the store after admin review.
checkout.yourDetailsDesc: Tell us anything we need to deliver your order.
checkout.couponDesc: Have a promo code? Apply it before submitting.
checkout.couponHint: Enter a valid code to unlock discounts.
checkout.paymentMethodPlaceholder: Select how you plan to pay (optional)
checkout.paymentMethodHint: Helps us send the right external payment instructions after approval.
checkout.externalPaymentNotice: No payment is taken on this page. You will receive instructions to pay by bank transfer, WhatsApp, or other methods we configure.
checkout.termsLabel: I agree to the terms and understand this submits an order request; payment is completed externally after approval.

orders.myOrdersSubtitle: Track and manage your digital orders.
orders.guestTokenHint: Save this page link — it contains your private access token for guest order tracking.
orders.deliveryHint: Save these details in a secure place. We recommend copying them now.

confirmation.title: Order request received
confirmation.subtitle: Your order is not paid yet. We will review it and send external payment instructions shortly.
confirmation.saveLink: Bookmark this page to track your order as a guest.
confirmation.whatNext: We will review your order and send payment instructions by email. Track progress anytime from your order page.

pending_review.title: Order under review
pending_review.description: Our team is reviewing your order. You will receive payment instructions soon.

awaiting_payment.title: Awaiting payment
awaiting_payment.description: Complete payment using the instructions below to continue processing.

payment_received.title: Payment received
payment_received.description: We received your payment and are preparing your delivery.

processing.title: Processing your order
processing.description: Your order is being fulfilled. Delivery details will appear here when ready.

delivered.title: Order delivered
delivered.description: Your digital products have been delivered. Save your credentials securely.

completed.title: Order complete
completed.description: This order is fully complete. Thank you for shopping with us.

cancelled.title: Order cancelled
cancelled.description: This order was cancelled. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.

needs_customer_response.title: Action required
needs_customer_response.description: We need additional information from you to continue with this order.

on_hold.title: Order on hold
on_hold.description: Your order is temporarily on hold. Check your email or contact support for details.

errors.VALIDATION: Please check the form and try again.
errors.OUT_OF_STOCK: This product is currently out of stock.
errors.COUPON_INACTIVE: This discount code is not active.
errors.COUPON_MIN_ORDER: Order total is too low for this code.
errors.COUPON_USAGE_LIMIT: This discount code has reached its usage limit.
errors.INTERNAL: Could not submit your order. Please try again.

account.title: Your account
account.subtitle: Manage orders and saved items in one place.

wishlist.title: Your wishlist
wishlist.metaDescription: Your saved products, ready when you need them.
wishlist.subtitle: Saved products ready when you are.
wishlist.empty: Your wishlist is empty. Heart items while browsing to save them here.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or was moved.
errors.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

legal.termsDescription: Terms and conditions for using the riyont digital marketplace.
legal.termsIntro: These terms govern your use of our digital marketplace. By placing an order, you agree to these conditions.
legal.termsSection1Body: All products are digital goods or services. Delivery times vary by product type. Instant delivery items are fulfilled automatically after confirmed payment.
legal.termsSection2Body: You are responsible for providing accurate information during checkout and for keeping your account credentials secure.
legal.privacyDescription: How riyont collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
legal.privacyIntro: We respect your privacy and only collect information needed to process orders and provide support.
legal.privacySection1Body: We may collect contact details, order history, and information you submit for service-based products.
legal.privacySection2Body: Your data is used to fulfill orders, improve the store experience, and respond to support requests. We do not sell personal data.
legal.refundDescription: Refund and cancellation policy for digital products and services.
legal.refundIntro: Because many items are digital or instantly delivered, refunds are handled case by case according to product type and delivery status.
legal.refundSection1Body: If a product was not delivered, was defective, or a service was not provided as described, contact support within 7 days of purchase.
legal.refundSection2Body: Delivered digital keys, activated accounts, or completed manual services may not be eligible for refund unless required by law.
legal.contactDescription: Get in touch with the riyont support team.
legal.contactIntro: Need help with an order, product, or account? Our team is here to assist you.
legal.contactSupportHint: For the fastest response, open a support ticket from your account.
